rules.ruleAction: Take maximum value from related group

stratificationRules.description: (([MDC] startswith 'EA') AND ([Partner MBA] LIKE '%WBBB%' OR [Partner MBA] LIKE '%WBUT%' OR [Partner MBA] LIKE '%WK1P%' OR [Partner MBA] LIKE '%WKKK%' OR [Partner MBA] LIKE '%WUNT%'))
(([MDC] startswith 'AH') OR ([MDC] startswith 'AM') OR ([MDC] startswith 'YC') OR ([MDC] startswith 'AO') OR ([MDC] startswith 'LO') OR ([MDC] startswith 'WL'))
